title: Hey Duggee Toy, Teddy Bear with all his Squirrel Club friends printed on, Brown
features: Hey Duggee - Incredibly soft and huggable, making it the ideal snuggle buddy for Duggee fans!
Hey Duggee Toys - Extra soft and cuddly for special cosy Duggee hugs, just like in the TV show.
DUGGEE - Duggee has each of his Squirrel Club friends printed on his front in lovely bright colours.
We care about the environment and so does Duggee! That's why this plush toy is made from 100% recycled fabrics and filling.
